_comment: Run 2 v5: PURE exp_009 replication. Same hyperparams as exp_009 (LR 2e-5, BETA 0.01, max_completion 6144), single epoch to step 70 instead of exp_009's aborted step 56. Isolates 'did exp_009 want more steps?' from every other variable. If +1pp Kaggle → epochs help, scale further. If flat → GRPO scaling exhausted, pivot to rescue v2 or hybrid routing.

reward._note: Format reward max = 0.225. Granular scoring ensures variance even when correctness is uniform across the 4 stochastic rollouts.
